description:
I saw B2's everywhere in this problem for some reason...

I find the shapes in this problem ironic... not sure if that justifies it being in the "shape" group

And yes, I know, w is ahead anyway, but I didn't feel like changing the entire game just to make the problem logical... doesn't make the move much different anyway
